flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Ohio Wesleyan University rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($30.3k → $35.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Ohio Wesleyan University fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (60.0% → 50.7%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ohio Wesleyan University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($48.8k → $53.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ohio Wesleyan University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
